homepage.title.message: LinguaX - macOS Smart Input Method Switching Tool

homepage.description.message: LinguaX is a lightweight menu bar input method management tool designed for macOS, automatically configuring appropriate input methods for each app, making switching seamless. Menu bar resident, smart, lightweight, elegant.

homepage.header.description.message: LinguaX is a menu bar input method management tool designed for macOS.

homepage.header.descriptionStrong.message: Configure dedicated input methods for each app, say goodbye to manual switching hassles.

homepage.features.titleAccent.message: Menu Bar Input Method Management Expert

homepage.features.description.message: From intelligent recognition to privacy protection, LinguaX is optimized for macOS menu bar environment, providing you with the most natural input method switching experience.

homepage.features.smart.description.message: Automatically recognizes app types and intelligently recommends suitable input methods

homepage.features.fast.description.message: Millisecond response, automatically switches input methods when switching apps

homepage.features.menubar.description.message: Lightweight design, stays in menu bar without affecting usage

homepage.features.native.description.message: Perfectly integrates with system design, supports light and dark themes

homepage.features.privacy.description.message: All data stored locally, no personal information collected

homepage.features.free.description.message: No ads, create trial license to experience full functionality

homepage.showcase.description.message: Experience true macOS menu bar app, no complex configuration needed, intelligently recognizes app types, millisecond response switching, perfectly integrates with system design.

homepage.showcase.simulation.note.message: 💡 Menu bar shows current input method in real-time, at a glance

homepage.showcase.advantage.smart.descri.message: Automatically recognizes app types, no manual configuration needed

homepage.showcase.advantage.light.descri.message: Pure menu bar app, extremely low system resource usage

homepage.showcase.scenarios.dev.desc.message: Code editors automatically switch to English input

homepage.showcase.scenarios.chat.desc.message: Chat apps automatically switch to Chinese input

homepage.showcase.scenarios.terminal.des.message: Command line tools automatically switch to English input

homepage.showcase.scenarios.docs.desc.message: Intelligently select input methods based on document type

homepage.faq.titleAccent.message: Everything You Want to Know is Here

homepage.faq.q1.message: Which macOS versions does LinguaX support?

homepage.faq.a1.message: LinguaX supports macOS 13.0 Ventura and higher, perfectly compatible with all Mac devices with Intel and Apple Silicon chips. Specially optimized for the latest macOS systems.

homepage.faq.q2.message: Will it affect system performance as a menu bar app?

homepage.faq.a2.message: Absolutely not. LinguaX uses efficient lightweight architecture, app size less than 5MB, extremely low memory usage, almost zero CPU usage. Specially optimized for menu bar environment, won't affect system performance.

homepage.faq.a3.message: LinguaX provides a simple app selection interface, you can select apps to configure from the installed app list, assign dedicated input methods for each app. Simple and intuitive operation, suitable for all types of users.

homepage.faq.q4.message: How fast is input method switching response?

homepage.faq.a4.message: LinguaX uses system-level listening mechanism, switching response time is in milliseconds, almost no delay. The switching process is completely in the background, won't interrupt your workflow.

homepage.faq.q5.message: How is data security and privacy guaranteed?

homepage.faq.a5.message: LinguaX strictly follows Apple's privacy policy, all configuration data is stored locally, never collects or uploads any personal information. The app doesn't need network permissions, ensuring your privacy is absolutely safe.

homepage.cta.description.message: Join nearly two thousand users and experience the most natural input method switching.

homepage.cta.descriptionStrong.message: Free trial, no ads, privacy protection, continuous updates.
